{{Quote|We'll be facing the Mandalorian chieftains attempting to defend the space above their world. Their proud warrior tradition means this will be a fight to the death!|Tyber Zann|<ref name="Forces" />}}
A '''skirmish''' over [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] occurred when [[Tyber Zann]] decided to perform an act of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] to extort ships from [[Mandal Hypernautics Corporation|Mandal Hypernautics]].

==The Skirmish==
{{Quote|I've successfully defeated the Mandalorian chieftain. The continuing raids will soon bring them to their knees.|Tyber Zann|<ref name="Forces" />}}
A small [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Consortium]] fleet arrived above the planet and began attacking an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] facility, resisting attacks from Mandalorian defenses. Once the facility was destroyed, the Mandalorian clan leader appeared in his own [[Keldabe-class cruiser|''Keldabe''-class battleship]] and attempted to stop the Consortium fleet, but was destroyed. After a brief period of piracy in the system afterwards, Mandal Hypernautics agreed to provide ships to the Consortium in exchange for a stop to the piracy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
